summary: Comprehensive testing of ApplianceRepairPageNew.js template redesign on /refrigerator-repair route (desktop viewport 1920x1080). ALL 11 SECTIONS VERIFIED with correct Precision Craft design system implementation. Color scheme #0D1B2A (dark navy), #1A2F45 (mid dark), #FF5722 (accent orange), #F8F5F0 (cream) verified throughout. Montserrat font confirmed on all headings and text.
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 sections properly implemented with correct data-testid attributes

Hero section: 45fr/55fr grid layout verified (ratio 0.45), breadcrumb present, orange eyebrow line (36px x 2px #FF5722), H1 fontWeight 800, trust badges (Licensed, 4.9 Google, License #51001), two CTA buttons (#FF5722 book, transparent call), tech note '10+ years' visible
How It Works: 4 steps with large numbers (01-04, fontSize 64px), orange icons (CalendarCheck, Search, ClipboardCheck, Wrench) all using color #FF5722, cream background #F8F5F0
Step by Step: numbered circles (32px x 32px) with #FF5722 background, left border accent (2px solid rgba(255,87,34,0.25)), dark #0D1B2A background
Common Problems: 2-column grid (418px x 418px), 6 cards with 3px solid #FF5722 left border, cream background
CTA Banner: dark navy #0D1B2A background, orange top/bottom borders (3px solid #FF5722), two CTA buttons present
Repair vs Replace: cream #F8F5F0 background, check/x icons present
FAQ: white background, 5 expandable questions with +/× toggles in orange #FF5722, 2px orange left border on expanded answers
Brands: cream background, 18 brand logos with hover border effect (transition enabled)
Related Services: white background, button text 'Learn More & Book Now' correct, CSS hover rule for #FF5722 present
Service Areas: 3-column layout (329px each) with SF/Peninsula/North Bay groups verified
Footer: 3-column layout, logo present, phone number (760) 543-5733 in orange #FF5722, license info #51001, orange top border (3px #FF5722)

success_rate.backend: N/A (static React SPA - frontend only test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified complete ApplianceRepairPageNew.js template redesign with all 11 sections present and styled per Precision Craft design system. Key data-testid attributes: service-hero, how-it-works, how-step-01/02/03/04, repair-visit-steps, common-problems, cta-banner, faq-section, brands-section, service-footer, related-service-0/1/2/3. Test performed on desktop viewport 1920x1080 at route /refrigerator-repair. Sections without data-testid: Repair vs Replace, Related Services (overall section), Service Areas. CSS hover effects defined correctly in inline <style> tag. Base URL: https://wine-repair-preview.preview.emergentagent.com
